title: Early Childhood Development Measurement And Intervention Coverage Gaps
summary: Build a verified workflow for measuring early childhood development outcomes and intervention coverage gaps, linking MICS ECDI data, preschool-access data, and nutrition data.
why_it_matters: Build a verified workflow for measuring early childhood development outcomes and intervention coverage gaps, linking MICS ECDI data, preschool-access data, and nutrition data.

success_metrics.target: Every claim links dated evidence with methodology.

review_policy.merge_gate: Schema validation, domain review, safety review, replication.
